title: /ask refuses every open-ended question (pre-flight USD budget=0) AND leaks the /ask prefix into the captured idea

rootCause.defectA: open_knowledge agent refuses every query at the pre-flight per-user-monthly USD gate (internal/assistant/openknowledge/agent/agent.go: PerUserMonthlyUSDRemaining <= 0 -> cap_usd) because config/smackerel.yaml set per_user_monthly_budget_usd: 0 while the production CostFn is a zero-cost stub. Code+config bug present on main; NOT deployment lag (deployed sourceSha 0bc04cfb contains the /ask->open_knowledge routing fix ebdbf852). Routing (/ask->open_knowledge) is correct.
rootCause.defectB: Telegram adapter HandleUpdate passed verbatim msg.Text (which preserves the /ask prefix for shortcut detection) into the capture-as-fallback hook, so the captured idea title included /ask.

codeVsDeployment: code+config (both fixed in-repo and validated). Live self-hosted symptom additionally requires a redeploy via the knb adapter (bubbles.devops).
resolution: DEFECT A: config/smackerel.yaml assistant.open_knowledge.monthly_budget_usd 0->100 and per_user_monthly_budget_usd 0->25 (positive ceilings; local zero-cost CostFn so they never bind; enabled:false is the disable switch). docs/Operations.md corrected (the stale '0 = unlimited' claim now states the SCN-064-A08 '0 = refuse-all' semantics). DEFECT B: internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/adapter.go HandleUpdate now strips the v1 slash-command prefix via assistant.StripShortcutPrefix before capture (local var renamed assistant->facade to avoid shadowing the import). Adversarial regression tests added in 3 new *_test.go files; all GREEN; go test ./... + gofmt clean.

certification.expansionReason: bugfix-fastlane audit + validate phases parent-expanded by bubbles.iterate: no nested runSubagent runtime available in this session; audit + validate executed directly (implementation-reality-scan + hermetic BUG064001 test suite + state-transition-guard) and recorded with real terminal evidence in report.md.
gatesPassed: test unit --go --go-run BUG064001: 6 BUG-064-001 tests GREEN (positive/zero budget pre-flight + config-contract + /ask strip + 5 v1 shortcuts + verbatim); BUG064001_TEST_EXIT=0
reality-scan (Gate G028 clean — framework Scan-1D noop exclusion landed; 0 violations, exit 0)
certification.liveEvidence: 2026-07-20 self-hosted /ask A/B (deployed core rev, ancestor of HEAD): DEFECT-A budget refuse-all cleared live — real answer (status=success, termination=final), not a cap_usd pre-flight refusal. See report.md#devops-live. DEFECT-B (Telegram capture-prefix strip) validated hermetically and present in the deployed rev.

blockedReason: The in-repo code+config fix is COMPLETE and validated, and the prior deployment/live-certification blockers are CLEARED. DEFECT-A (budget refuse-all): fixed in config/smackerel.yaml (monthly_budget_usd 0->100, per_user_monthly_budget_usd 0->25) and PROVEN LIVE on the self-hosted /ask A/B (ARM-A qwen3 HTTP 200, real cited USDA-hardiness-zone verdict via the real gather+synthesis loop; the deployed rev already contains the fix). DEFECT-B (capture prefix): fixed in internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/adapter.go:367 (assistant.StripShortcutPrefix) and hermetically GREEN this session (TestAgent_BUG064001_PositivePerUserBudget_ProceedsPastPreflight + ZeroPerUserBudget_StillRefusesPreflight + capture_prefix_bug064001_test.go all PASS; ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run BUG064001 exit 0). The ONLY remaining, IRREDUCIBLE blocker to a real state-transition-guard exit 0 is Gate G028 (implementation-reality-scan) firing 5 FALSE POSITIVES on internal/telegram/assistant_adapter/adapter.go lines 147/152/154/214/338 — all pre-existing OTel telemetry from commit 2886d516e (2026-05-29, spec-061, git-blame confirmed), NOT this bug: lines 147/152/154 are the standard OTel no-op tracer fallback (tracing.NewTracer Enabled:false; production always injects the real tracer), and lines 214/338 emit the closed-vocabulary span-status literal 'noop' that is CONTRACT-DEFINED in internal/assistant/tracing/tracer.go:23 (status vocab ok|error|noop, used identically at facade.go:471/1752). The reality-scan's INTEGRATION_SUSPICIOUS_PATTERNS matches the substring 'noop' case-insensitively with NO allowlist / inline-suppression / bubbles-project.yaml knob; the scanner is a framework-managed immutable file, and the 'noop' values cannot change without breaking the telemetry contract. Editing adapter.go cannot clear G028 (214/338 are contract-locked) and de-referencing the genuinely-changed adapter.go from the reality-scan file list would be dishonest scanner-gaming (rejected per anti-fabrication). Secondary residual (moot while G028 blocks): G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity fails for SCOPE-02 B-scenarios because the Check-22 DoD-extraction awk exits at the first heading after SCOPE-01's DoD in the single-file two-scope layout (the faithful DoD items DO exist in SCOPE-02) — fixable by a per-scope-directory layout, deferred because it does not unblock; G056/G057/G022/5A/8A are done-time artifacts to be added at promotion. NEXT STEP: route G028 to the Bubbles framework owner to refine implementation-reality-scan.sh so contract telemetry-status literals (noop/no-op span statuses + no-op tracer fallbacks) are not flagged FAKE_INTEGRATION (e.g. an inline reality-scan-ok:<reason> suppression, or an ### Implementation Files line-scoping capability); once landed, add the certification block + scenario-manifest and re-drive the guard to done.
nextRequiredOwner: bubbles.iterate (final promotion commit — all done-grade gates closed)
followUps: G028-FRAMEWORK: RESOLVED — the implementation-reality-scan.sh Scan-1D OTel-'noop' false-positive was fixed at the framework source (bubbles origin/main b4702be) and the vendored scanner is byte-identical; reality-scan now exits 0 for this bug.

G068-LAYOUT: RESOLVED — the two scope headings were aligned to the canonical '## Scope N:' form so the guard's single-file splitter reads each scope's DoD against its own scenarios (Check-22 now PASS). Per-scope-directory conversion is no longer needed.
FOLLOW-UP-1 (owner bubbles.plan/bubbles.test): tests/e2e/assistant_bs007_test.sh asserts stale /ask->retrieval_qa routing (tier-gated/skipped). Separate cross-spec finding, not this bug.

FOLLOW-UP-2 (owner bubbles.test): spec-073 TestRenderDescriptorV1_* canaries t.Fatalf on missing node/dart instead of t.Skip (hard-fail the unit suite in minimal containers). Separate finding, not this bug.
DEPLOY: DONE — the deployed self-hosted rev already contains the DEFECT-A fix and the 2026-07-20 /ask A/B proved it live (real cited verdict). No pending redeploy.
